The [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] '''DL-22 Blaster Pistol''' was designed as a response to the [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|MerrSonn]] [[DD6 blaster pistol/Legends|DD6]] weapon. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] had one of these weapons. [[Reen Irana]] also used one of these blasters.<ref name="Scourge novel">[[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']]</ref>

The gun's [[Barrel/Legends|barrel]] used a higher-grade focusing crystal to increase the damage dealt by the weapon's blasts, at the expense of the gun's stun setting.<ref name="gundark" /> The DL-22 was held in high regard by those who prefer to customize their weapons. It had a curved handle, without a [[Scope/Legends|scope]].
